posts.author: ksanborn (Kayla Sanborn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m looking to connect with members of the community that are working on improving their utilization of Monday.com! I work for MMC Consulting, based in Minneapolis, MN and we’re offering free initial consults to hear what your goals are for Monday.com, listen to your questions, and offer solutions.

Whether it’s fully automating your CRM to keep customers from falling through the cracks, enabling your team to successfully collaborate on key engagements, improving organizational adoption of the tool, or developing smooth integrations to save you time, we can help you maximize the value of Monday.com.

Please email plyngdal@mmcmsp.com and we can set up your initial consultation.

We are looking forward to partnering with you and your team!
